name: Nataliya - An Unexpected Visit (as in you 🫵)
description:
"ETHAN. IT'S ME ETHAN. I WILL SAVE YOU FROM THE TALL DOMMY MILF VAMPIRE, ETHAN. I NEED YOUR HELP, ETHAN. YOU NEED TO CONTINUE THE REDFIELD BLOODLINE, ETHAN. Boulder punching noises" - Chris Redfield

You have a rather rich friend, named Lyla. One day, she asks you over to her place for some reason. However, you learn she's not there, and in the house? Her mom. And she's about to make one hell of a proposition.

[HUMAN MALE POV INTENDED]

Original art by GhastlyFish

Day 4 now. And you know I had to do... y'know... una madre tigre or however you format it. Uh... also... that Resident Evil meme reference isn't a coincidence. If y'all do so... well, congrats and good luck...
creator: crimsonwhitefang03
